title: Transmor
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Transmor''''' was a group of three [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] that delivered a [[Grain/Legends|grain]] shipment, [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] by [[Ghorin]], to the Rebel freighters [[Khan (starship)|Khan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''

[[Category:Imperial Navy units]]
